name: UptimeRobot
description: Manage UptimeRobot (uptime monitoring) monitors, alert contacts, maintenance windows, public status pages from any AI agent. 8 tools, API-key auth.
instructions:
This connector wraps the UptimeRobot API v2 (api.uptimerobot.com/v2).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://uptimerobot.com → **My Settings → API Settings**.
2. Generate the **Main API Key** (full access to your monitors) OR a per-monitor read-only key. Most users want the Main key.
3. Set `UPTIMEROBOT_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: every request POSTs to /v2/* with `api_key=...` injected as a query parameter on the URL. The API accepts the key either in the URL or in the body — this adapter uses the URL so each tool's body remains clean form-encoded params. We also always send `format=json` so responses are JSON instead of XML.

**Monitor types** (integer codes):
- 1: HTTP(s)
- 2: Keyword (HTTP body must/must-not contain string)
- 3: Ping (ICMP)
- 4: Port (TCP)
- 5: Heartbeat (cron-style — your job pings UptimeRobot every N minutes)

**Status codes** (integer):
- 0: paused
- 1: not checked yet
- 2: up
- 8: seems down
- 9: down

**Pagination**: `offset` (0-based) + `limit` (max 50). Total returned in the `pagination.total` field.

**Rate limits**: 10 req/min per API key on the free plan; higher on paid. 429 has no Retry-After — back off 6s.

**Out of scope here**: subscription management, agent / probe location selection (paid feature), white-label status page customization.

tools.name: uptimerobot_get_account_details
tools.description: Returns account info: email, monitor_limit, monitor_interval, up_monitors, down_monitors, paused_monitors.

tools.name: uptimerobot_get_monitors
tools.description: List monitors. Optional filters by id, status, search string. Use `logs=1` to include up/down event history; `response_times=1` for response-time series; both add latency.

monitors.description: Comma-separated monitor IDs to fetch (default: all).

search.description: Substring filter against friendly_name or url.

logs.description: 1 to include event log; 0 to skip.

tools.name: uptimerobot_new_monitor
tools.description: Create a new monitor. `type` is required (1=HTTP, 2=Keyword, 3=Ping, 4=Port, 5=Heartbeat). For type=2 you must also supply `keyword_type` (1=exists, 2=not exists) + `keyword_value`.

interval.description: Check interval in seconds (60-86400). Free plan minimum 300.

keyword_value.description: Keyword to look for (required if type=2).

tools.name: uptimerobot_edit_monitor
tools.description: Edit an existing monitor. Pass `id` + any field you want to update.

tools.name: uptimerobot_get_alert_contacts
tools.description: List configured alert contacts (email, webhook, Slack, Telegram, SMS).

tools.name: uptimerobot_get_psps
tools.description: List public status pages (PSPs) configured for this account.
